verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Oh Lord, we are Your people Chosen by Your grace You took us from the heathen To be a super race And as children of the great King of kings We have all reason to shout and sing You've given us joy, joy, joy You've given us joy, joy, joy

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: If You should mark iniquity Which of us could stand? How could we get through this life Wihtout Your guiding hand? So Lord, we ask You, Forgive our failures And deliver us from all temptations Amd make us strong, strong, strong Amd make us strong, strong, strong

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We know we're not deserving Of all Your graciousness We know we fail You daily And sometimes misbehave But Lord, we love You. We want to serve You Yes Lord, we need You and we believe You will help us overcome You will help us overcome

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Oh yes, You have redeemed us By Your precious blood Your power brought deliverance When Satan came in like a flood And Lord, we see You strong in battle Yes Lord, we see You Breaking the shackles And giving us joy, joy, joy And giving us joy, joy, joy
